## Description

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## How has this been tested?

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] Previews render correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the atomic design folder structure
- [ ] I used semantic tokens instead of raw values
- [ ] I added or updated tests
- [ ] I updated the DocC catalog if needed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] I updated `ROADMAP.md` if status changed
